scope: no-training FP32 quotient-tangent/NTK audit of the failed one-state coordinate panel; no optimizer or model change and no later Gate

decision_rule.rank_deficient: repair the equivariant vector-output basis before any optimizer experiment
decision_rule.full_rank_ill_conditioned: qualify one principled output/gradient preconditioner at unchanged model capacity and budget
decision_rule.full_rank_well_conditioned: inspect optimizer update and nonlinear curvature without adding steps or capacity
decision_rule.boundary: This no-training audit cannot change historical H1a failures, initialize production or authorize H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
